antithesis_summary: Spend some of the simplicity dividend on more ordinary depth, even if that costs throughput.
label: Capacity vs throughput
thesis_summary: Keep the proven 8-layer scale because short-run step count may dominate modest capacity gains.
why_active: The incumbent already leaves substantial VRAM headroom, but its strong result may still come more from reaching 938 steps and 491.8M tokens than from nominal parameter count.
